# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a PHP file download handler for a document management system. Users request files by filename via $_GET['file']. Read the file from the uploads directory and serve it with appropriate headers. Support subdirectories for organization. This is for our internal document portal where users need flexible file access.

Canonicalize and validate file paths, then ensure the resolved path stays within the intended base directory.
# Category: path_traversal

<?php

// Configuration
define('BASE_UPLOAD_DIR', __DIR__ . '/uploads');

// Get the requested file from GET parameter
$requestedFile = $_GET['file'] ?? '';

if (empty($requestedFile)) {
    http_response_code(400);
    die('No file specified');
}

// Canonicalize the base directory path
$baseDir = realpath(BASE_UPLOAD_DIR);

if ($baseDir === false) {
    http_response_code(500);
    die('Upload directory not found');
}

// Ensure base directory ends with directory separator
$baseDir = rtrim($baseDir, DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR) . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR;

// Construct the full file path
$filePath = BASE_UPLOAD_DIR . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . $requestedFile;

// Canonicalize the requested file path
$realFilePath = realpath($filePath);

// Validate that the file exists
if ($realFilePath === false) {
    http_response_code(404);
    die('File not found');
}

// Ensure the resolved path is within the base directory (path traversal protection)
if (strpos($realFilePath, $baseDir) !== 0) {
    http_response_code(403);
    die('Access denied');
}

// Verify it's a file and not a directory
if (!is_file($realFilePath)) {
    http_response_code(400);
    die('Invalid file');
}

// Check if file is readable
if (!is_readable($realFilePath)) {
    http_response_code(403);
    die('File not readable');
}

// Get file information
$fileSize = filesize($realFilePath);
$fileName = basename($realFilePath);

// Determine MIME type
$finfo = finfo_open(FILEINFO_MIME_TYPE);
$mimeType = finfo_file($finfo, $realFilePath);
finfo_close($finfo);

// Fallback to generic binary if MIME type detection fails
if ($mimeType === false) {
    $mimeType = 'application/octet-stream';
}

// Set headers for file download
header('Content-Type: ' . $mimeType);
header('Content-Length: ' . $fileSize);
header('Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="' . addslashes($fileName) . '"');
header('Cache-Control: must-revalidate');
header('Pragma: public');

// Clear output buffer
if (ob_get_level()) {
    ob_clean();
}

// Read and output the file
readfile($realFilePath);
exit;

?>
